context: "What do you do for fun?" is one of the first questions you'll be asked - and a great one to ask back. Once you can name what you enjoy, conversations almost run themselves.
explanation: The frame does the work: "que haces?" (what do you do?) to ask, "en mi tiempo libre" (in my free time) to set the scene, and "me gusta" plus an activity to answer - "me gusta cocinar".

examples.es: Que haces en tu tiempo libre?
examples.en: What do you do in your free time?

examples.es: En mi tiempo libre, me gusta cocinar.
examples.en: In my free time, I like to cook.
